title: A Famous Model and Actress from Dallas Has Passed Away
summary: Annabel Schofield was a model and actress who became famous in the 1980s. She was born in Wales and moved to London at age 16 to start modeling. She worked with big fashion brands like Versace and starred in a popular jeans commercial. Later, she acted in the TV show Dallas and lived in Los Angeles. Sadly, she died at age 62 from cancer in February. She had been sick for a while and talked about her illness to get help with treatment costs. People remember her as beautiful, funny, and kind. Her modeling agency said she was very important to their success. She also wrote a book and worked as a producer. Her story shows how she achieved her dreams but faced a tough illness.

background_read: Annabel Schofield was a Welsh model who became famous in the 1980s for fashion work and a jeans ad. She later acted in Dallas and lived in Los Angeles. She died from cancer, and her story teaches us about following dreams and facing health challenges.
Article_Structure: WHO: Annabel Schofield, a model and actress from Wales
WHAT: She died from cancer at age 62 after a modeling and acting career
WHERE: She lived in Los Angeles and worked in London and the US
WHY: To share her life story and how she dealt with illness

perspectives.description: Annabel achieved fame through hard work in modeling and acting.
She faced cancer bravely and sought support for treatment.
